name: Cornish Metals Inc.
description: Cornish Metals plc is a mineral exploration and development company focused on the re-opening of its wholly owned and permitted South Crofty underground tin mine in Cornwall, United Kingdom. Recognized as one of the highest-grade tin resources globally, the project aims to become a low-cost, sustainable producer. Beyond South Crofty, the company holds extensive mineral rights across Cornwall, targeting the discovery of tin, copper, lithium, tungsten, zinc, and silver. By leveraging its expert team and strong local community support, Cornish Metals is positioned to contribute significantly to the supply of critical minerals for a low-carbon economy.
